title: Applied History Lab
public_claim: Applied History Lab is presented as a portfolio infrastructure and source-system page.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from project inventory to source record, governance state, review packet, release gate, and public explanation. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
